version_description: Can be played with capo 1 (no transpose) to make easier.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]D#m7[/ch] [ch]A#m7[/ch] [ch]Bmaj7[/ch] x4

[Chorus]
[tab]           [ch]D#m7[/ch]                [ch]A#m7[/ch]    [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
Heart been broke so many times I don't know what to believe[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D#m7[/ch]              [ch]A#m7[/ch]             [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
Mama say it’s my fault, it's my fault, I wear my heart on my sleeve[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]D#m7[/ch]                   [ch]A#m7[/ch]      [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
Think it's best I put my heart on ice, heart on ice ’cause I can't breathe[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D#m7[/ch]                   [ch]A#m7[/ch]      [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
I'ma put my heart on ice, heart on ice, it's gettin' the best of me[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab]                             [ch]D#m7[/ch]                             [ch]A#m7[/ch]
While in the cell with Lil' Hakeem, after I slapped him I had told him[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
"I don't know how you get down with them clowns but I'm a soldier"[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D#m7[/ch]                           [ch]A#m7[/ch]
No one could understand, I had way too much aggression[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
That built over the years from my abandoned adolescence[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D#m7[/ch]                      [ch]A#m7[/ch]
See I done been lied to, backstabbed, and heartbroken[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
I wanted to cry but I was too afraid to open[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D#m7[/ch]                       [ch]A#m7[/ch]
Prayin’ one day I’d find a peace of mind by the ocean[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
I spent all my time committing crimes to get closer[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]D#m7[/ch]                            [ch]A#m7[/ch]      [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
While at my nana house I play the couch, starin' at the ceiling[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
Tryin’ not to get in my feelings[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D#m7[/ch]                   [ch]A#m7[/ch]
Thinkin' of a way I could make these millions[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
Maybe that'll take this pain away and clear up all these rainy days, yeah[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]           [ch]D#m7[/ch]                [ch]A#m7[/ch]    [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
Heart been broke so many times I don't know what to believe[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D#m7[/ch]              [ch]A#m7[/ch]             [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
Mama say it’s my fault, it's my fault, I wear my heart on my sleeve[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]D#m7[/ch]                   [ch]A#m7[/ch]       [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
Think it's best I put my heart on ice, heart on ice ’cause I can't breathe[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D#m7[/ch]                   [ch]A#m7[/ch]      [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
I'ma put my heart on ice, heart on ice, it's gettin' the best of me[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]A#m7[/ch] [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
Yeah, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m7[/ch]       [ch]A#m7[/ch] [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
Yeah, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m7[/ch]  [ch]A#m7[/ch] [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
Yeah, yeah, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m7[/ch]      [ch]A#m7[/ch]
Yeah, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
Brrt[/tab]

[ch]D#m7[/ch] [ch]A#m7[/ch] [ch]Bmaj7[/ch] x4
